package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for model_to_dto_mapping_in_handler: Handlers that manually shape every response from persistence structs rather than using dedicated mapping helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule099NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule099NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule099NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario099Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule099NegativeService, input Rule099NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
